IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (21830565.pdf)
SUMMARY: Certified Human Resources Professional with 15 years background in full range of HR functions with extensive experience in employee management, hiring, training State and Federal compliance and the ability to incorporate HR practices to achieve business results.
SKILLS: Training and development, Performance management, Recruiting, Employment law compliance, Exceptional interpersonal skills, Employee relations, Manager coaching and training, Change management, Leave management, Compliance, Employee relations, Disciplinary actions, Review process, Training needs analysis, Succession planning, HR Metrics, Conflict resolution, Vendor evaluation

SOURCE: 21830565.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Consultant
COMPANY: Company Name City, State
DATES: July 2014 - December 2014
DESCRIPTION: Partnered with legal department of multi-state client (40,000+ employees) to establish ADAAA and other workplace compliance. Identified and updated a backlog of LOA and accommodation issues.

SOURCE: 21830565.pdf
JOB TITLE: Human Resource Specialist
COMPANY: Company Name City, State
DATES: August 2008 - June 2014
DESCRIPTION: Provided customized HR service solutions that positively impact client business and ensure compliance with State and Federal laws. Designed employee performance evaluation process.

SOURCE: 21830565.pdf
JOB TITLE: Human Resource Generalist
COMPANY: Company Name City, State
DATES: April 2007 - April 2008
DESCRIPTION: Partnered with managers to interpret and implement company policy. Provided coaching and counsel in the areas of employee relations.

SOURCE: 21830565.pdf
JOB TITLE: Human Resources Coordinator
COMPANY: Company Name City, State
DATES: January 2003 - January 2007
DESCRIPTION: Provided HR support for 3 sites. Managed LOA and conducted investigations to resolve employee issues.

JOB TITLE: Administrative Assistant
COMPANY: Company Name City, State

DESCRIPTION: Provided general support for the HR department. Managed company events and answered benefits inquiries.
